item.title: I just wanted to see him for Easter...
item.description: His crazy family has been indoctrinating him into their conspiracy theories and recently tried to give my dog Ivermectin. Despite my best efforts it's 30 vs 1. After I get home from Easter I'm officially cutting contact. The thought of never seeing him again breaks my heart but the man who raised me died long ago. I'm not sure how my sisters will react and I'm unsure on how to even tell him. Maybe one day I will have the courage but right now I just want to lay down and cry. Happy Easter Imgur...
item.dc:creator: Dragonspiller

item.dc:creator: middleburgh

item.title: Surprise Easter kittens!
item.description:
I picked up Pepa and Julietta this morning. They were super scared and hid behind my toilet. No one was expecting them to give birth so soon! Look at the little baby under Julietta! She’s already being a good second mom.
This was a video, but Imgur is acting up. This little guy was cold to to touch, but moving around a lot. It was nerve wracking to move them, but the tile floor was cold.
I tried here first. It was already set up, but she must have been too scared to use it. She kept leaving to hide behind the toilet.
I set up this nursery for the cats with some more cover. I ask Julieta to please use this as her birthing suite. I tried to make behind the toilet an unsuitable location. They’re both in there now.
Clean towel, safe space, and a heating pad. Mama is purring loudly and all of the babies are moving around a lot. I hope she and the babies get a good night of sleep. She came from a loud, crowded environment so I hope she finds peace here. The Imgur community is amazing and has asked how they can help my fosters. We are always in need of supplies! There is a wishlist linked if you’d like to send some kitty things our way. :) https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/1CWKEHIN8OBJP?ref_=wl_share
item.dc:creator: kittycrazy88

item.title: The crazy thing about this, is no one knows where the 200,000 tons of excavated rock went after the people carved it. Not a single trace of it anywhere near. The rock being carved is also incredibly strong, it isn't just soft limestone.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: My grandmother’s Ukrainian painted egg collection
item.description:
This is a collection of painted eggs my grandmother had collected that I was recently shown. Some of them are actually hollowed out egg shells, others are wooden, and there are a couple of ceramic eggs. I was told that many of these came from Ukraine but I cannot verify the history or origin of any of them. Enjoy!
This is a wood egg that opens up
This one is an actual egg shell.
Another view of the same egg.
Another real egg, the detail on these is amazing. They are all the size of a medium chicken egg, so not very large.
Another real one, this is the first side.
And the other side.
One more real one, side a.
Side b.
Another wooden egg that opens up.
A slightly larger wood egg that doesn’t open.
One of the ceramic eggs, harder to photograph but obviously glazed and relatively heavy.
And the last ceramic one. Thanks for looking and happy Easter! Or better yet, happy zombie Jesus day! ?‍♂️
Pet tax, Oliver in back and old lady Shilo getting their creek on.
item.dc:creator: RadmonCake

item.title: Memes will keep us together
item.description:
SAY IT! Dr. Vladenfurter
Romance?
.
And why not is this?
The more you know.
.
Rumblie in your tumbly
Calm down, Sheila!
I would wear these clothes.
Let's make them DARKER.
Accurate.
I don't know why this makes you feel better but you do you, boo.
.
Yes please and also now.
.
.
Or now. Now is also good.
.
Heh.
.
.
.
Damn right.
Every time.
My life.
Sit up straight. Spidey commands.
Looking up recipe now.
Truth.
Clippy is everso helpful.
Yup.
.
Thanks Marie Callander.
.
Teeheehee
Accurate update.
Me in a nutshell.
I heart you, imgur.
.
Hyuk.
*grin*
.
You know this pain.
.
.
Old school
You can hear this in his voice.
It's you
I have this and I'm obsessed with it.
Legit.
Cat tax!

item.title: There goes my hero, he’s ordinary

item.title: Everything is chaos including these memes I have to get off my phone #2
item.description:
My Kitty's name was Mozzarella, but usually I called her Ella.
I think I uploaded some in #1 without sound. Sorry to all 5 people who may have seen that! Also, the unintended theme of this appears to be cats and relationships. I used to have both, but now I just have a cat that my parents are looking after right now because they have a big yard, and I don't.
item.dc:creator: tibby

item.dc:creator: AerinLovesCats

item.title: Russian commanders gave permission to evacuate but relented. Ukrainian convoy turned into a fireball.
item.description: Lypivka, a blip of a village dwarfed by immense wheat fields, was occupied by Russian soldiers for a month until March 31. Here, villagers said the Russians double crossed them. Some village women had begged Russian commanders for permission to evacuate and the Russians seemed to agree. So on March 12th, a group of older men, women and children piled into 14 cars and slowly began to drive to safety. “All of us had white flags and we had permission,” said Valriy Tymchuk, a shopkeeper, who was driving a minibus in the convoy. But then Russian armored personnel carriers swiveled toward them, villagers said. A shell ripped into the first car. And then another. And then another. The convoy turned into a fireball. Mr. Tymchuk said he saw a family of four, including a young child, trapped in their car and engulfed in flames. Many of the singed cars are still on the road. The charred bones of that child are still in back seat, Ms. Tymchuk said. What appeared to be bone pieces were scattered among the blackened metal and heaps of ash. Next to the cars lied two dead pet dogs, fur singed. Mr. Tymchuk barely escaped after his minibus was hit and shrapnel sliced into his face. He shook his head when asked why he thought the Russians did this. “They are zombies,” he said. https://www.instagram.com/p/CcY4o5EAja9/
item.dc:creator: GlobalImageServiceCat

item.title: Come on in, the water is fine
item.dc:creator: TheBloodyLady

item.title: "The reports of my death are greatly exaggerated." - Shania Twain
item.description:
Mr Curry (Edit -not him but a fan on a parody page) want us to know that he is very much alive.
A recent photo of the man himself.
Some pix of the many iconic performances he has delivered. His range is outstanding, wouldn't you agree? Maybe on Tuesday, Imgur can show this icon some love. I'll send him links to anything that goes viral if you tag me. I don't know if Tim will see it but it's worth doing for him on his birthday.
item.dc:creator: imflukeskywalker
